Trust

Terms

Video Editor Jobs is an early community and intake surface for video editors and hiring teams. Submitting a form does not guarantee a job, candidate match, or hiring outcome.

Early-stage service

The site currently collects editor profiles and hiring briefs for review and matching exploration. Public job listings and account-based workflows may be added later.

Submission accuracy

People submitting editor profiles or hiring briefs are responsible for providing accurate, lawful, and appropriate information. Do not submit confidential material, private client files, or content you do not have permission to share.

No hiring guarantee

Video Editor Jobs may review submissions and contact people about relevant opportunities, but it does not guarantee employment, paid work, candidate quality, or project completion.

Community use

When sharing the site in communities, follow each community's rules. Do not spam groups, misrepresent affiliation, or post on behalf of Video Editor Jobs without permission.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to hello@videoeditorjobs.com.

Video Editor Jobs

A focused editor community and hiring intake surface for recurring video work.
